title: senecio tephrosioides
intro: Senecio tephrosioides, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, providing relief from symptoms such as bloating, coughs, and eczema. Senecio tephrosioides can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
